AR1.justification: Treated decisions.md as the durable commitment register and created a new daybook entry for today's response rather than touching the existing decision, matching the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Cold-pickup scenario was enacted via concrete file reads (AGENTS.md, decisions.md, 2026-04-22.md) and a created daybook artifact (2026-05-17.md), each step grounded in a real on-disk artifact.

AR3.justification: The decision citation uses the relative path decisions.md with an ISO date anchor (2026-04-15) and exact title, all of which resolve to the actual entry.

AR4.justification: Actions are append-only: the existing decision was read not modified, and a new dated daybook file was created, so a re-run would only refresh reads or no-op on the create without corrupting history.
